title: TransformableResource
description: Transformed resource a unit may produce, with estimated duration for the caller-owned unit.

inputs.description: Cargo resource ids and quantities consumed when the order starts.

quantity.description: Output quantity added to cargo on completion.

work.description: Arbitrary work units for duration calculation.

transformationDurationMs.description: Estimated duration for this unit (work / transformation.speed × PLANET_BASE_BUILD_MS).
